message:
fix(runtime): RAII polling guard and closed-region arena cleanup

io_driver.rs: Replace manual is_polling flag management with a
PollingGuard drop guard. Previously, if a panic occurred between
setting is_polling=true and the final store(false), the flag would
remain stuck at true, permanently blocking all subsequent polls.
The PollingGuard ensures:
  - is_polling is always cleared on drop (panic or normal return)
  - Events buffer is restored to the driver even on unwind, preventing
    event loss after panics during reactor.poll()

state.rs: Remove closed regions from the arena after their hierarchy
is cleaned up. Previously, closing a region updated parent pointers
but left the region entry in the arena, causing a slow memory leak
proportional to the number of short-lived regions over the runtime's
lifetime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
